channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Simpsons Showrunner Addresses Possible Series Finale
item.description: Don’t expect a fond farewell from The Simpsons anytime soon—or ever. Ahead of the long-running Fox cartoon’s landmark 800th episode Feb. 15, showrunne...

item.title: Cynthia Erivo Addresses Rumor That She and Ariana Grande Were “Lovers”
item.description: Something has changed within Cynthia Erivo, and she’s ready to address those Ariana Grande romance rumors. Indeed, the actress—who costarred alongside...

item.title: Maya Hawke Marries Christian Lee Hutson in Valentine's Day Ceremony
item.description: Maya Hawke has been struck by Cupid’s arrow. The Stranger Things alum exchanged vows with singer Christian Lee Hutson during a Valentine’s Day ceremon...

item.title: Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
Glove Found Near Nancy Guthrie’s Home Possibly Linked to Suspect
item.description: Authorities have discovered key information in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie. As the search for Today anchor Savannah Guthrie’s mom continues aft...

item.title: An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor

item.description: Lindsey Vonn’s path to recovery hasn’t been easy. After the alpine ski racer crashed during the women’s downhill final at the Olympics in Cortina, Ita...

item.title: Manchester Orchestra Drummer, Timothy Very, Dead at 42
item.description: Manchester Orchestra is reeling after the sudden death of their longtime drummer Timothy Very. The Atlanta-based indie rock band broke the heartbreaki...

item.title: 'Selling Sunset's Jason Oppenheim and Girlfriend Jessica Vargas Breakup

item.title: Investigators Deploy High-Tech Signal Sniffer in Search for Nancy Guthrie

item.title: Former UFC Champ Cain Velasquez Released From Prison on Parole
item.description: Cain Velasquez -- a former UFC heavyweight champion -- has been reunited with his family after spending 11 months locked up for allegedly attempting t...

item.title: David Harbour Out With Mystery Woman As He Skips Maya Hawke's Wedding
